workflow_name: Customer Escalation Email -> Risk Brief + Manager Loop
user_message: Can you work with me on forecast prep for Evergreen Solutions? We had a deep-dive last month -- need the follow-up.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-16 14:15 EST
Subject: Follow-up: forecast prep Review

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about forecast prep. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
Date: 2024-01-28 09:26 EST
Subject: Re: Re: forecast prep Timeline

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with forecast prep. What are the next steps from your side?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF34-O trap (No native 'escalation playbook' in the skills set forces synthesis from multiple); produces complete Severity assessment, manager risk brief, customer-facing draft response, stakeholder map delta, fore
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF34-O failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF34-O failure mode (No native 'escalation playbook' in the skills set forces synthesis from multiple)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct forecast prep decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF34-O -- No native 'escalation playbook' in the skills set forces synthesis from multiple
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
